description.p: This is a community package of Rowboat, maintained independently. It repackages Rowboat Labs' official Linux Debian package unmodified.

Rowboat is an open-source AI coworker that keeps long-lived memory on your machine as plain Markdown. It builds and runs multi-agent workflows so you can delegate work rather than issue one-off prompts.

ul.li: Chat with an AI coworker that remembers context across sessions.
Bring your own LLM — hosted providers with your API keys, or a local model via Ollama or LM Studio.
Connect Google (Gmail, Calendar, Drive), voice, web search, and external tools over the Model Context Protocol.
Notes and memory live locally as plain Markdown files under ~/.rowboat.

description.p: Permissions: this package grants network, display, GPU, audio (playback and microphone), notifications, keyring, and read/write access to its own data directory (~/.rowboat) so your notes stay editable with your own tools. It does not grant broad home-directory or host access; running local MCP servers or reading files elsewhere needs a user-granted filesystem override.

screenshot.caption: The Rowboat AI coworker desktop interface
